title: Well-posedness for a generalized derivative nonlinear Schr\"odinger   equation
comment:
v2: minor revision; 21 pages. The assumption of Theorem 1.7 is
  weakened slightly. To appear in Journal of Differential Equations
summary:
We study the Cauchy problem for a generalized derivative nonlinear
Schr\"odinger equation with the Dirichlet boundary condition. We establish the
local well-posedness results in the Sobolev spaces $H^1$ and $H^2$. Solutions
are constructed as a limit of approximate solutions by a method independent of
a compactness argument. We also discuss the global existence of solutions in
the energy space $H^1$.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有Dirichlet边界条件的广义导数非线性Schrödinger方程Cauchy问题的局部适定性，并讨论了能量空间中的整体存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有Dirichlet边界条件的广义导数非线性Schrödinger方程的Cauchy问题，这类方程在非线性光学、等离子体物理等领域有重要应用，边界条件的引入使得问题更具挑战性
AI.techniques: 采用不依赖于紧性论证的近似解极限构造方法，在Sobolev空间H¹和H²中建立局部适定性，通过能量方法讨论整体存在性
AI.main_theorems: 在Sobolev空间H¹和H²中建立了局部适定性结果，并讨论了能量空间H¹中解的整体存在性条件
AI.significance: 为具有边界条件的导数非线性Schrödinger方程提供了严格的数学理论框架，扩展了该类方程的研究范围，为物理应用提供了理论基础

title: The Primitive Equations in the scaling invariant space $L^{\infty}(L^1)$
summary:
Consider the primitive equations on $\R^2\times (z_0,z_1)$ with initial data
$a$ of the form $a=a_1+a_2$, where $a_1 \in BUC_\sigma(\R^2;L^1(z_0,z_1))$ and
$a_2 \in L^\infty_\sigma(\R^2;L^1(z_0,z_1))$ and where $BUC_\sigma(L^1)$ and
$L^\infty_\sigma(L^1)$ denote the space of all solenoidal, bounded uniformly
continuous and all solenoidal, bounded functions on $\R^2$, respectively, which
take values in $L^1(z_0,z_1)$. These spaces are scaling invariant and represent
the anisotropic character of these equations. It is shown that, if
$\|a_2\|_{L^\infty_\sigma(L^1)}$ is sufficiently small, then this set of
equations has a unique, local, mild solution. If in addition $a$ is periodic in
the horizontal variables, then this solution is a strong one and extends to a
unique, global, strong solution. The primitive equations are thus strongly and
globally well-posed for these data. The approach depends crucially on mapping
properties of the hydrostatic Stokes semigroup in the $L^\infty(L^1)$-setting
and can thus be seen as the counterpart of the classical iteration schemes for
the Navier-Stokes equations for the situation of the primitive equations.

AI.tldr: 证明了原始方程在特定各向异性函数空间中的局部适定性和周期条件下的全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究原始方程（大气和海洋动力学中的基本模型）在具有各向异性特征的函数空间中的适定性问题，这些空间反映了原始方程在水平和垂直方向上的不同尺度特性
AI.techniques: 利用水静力Stokes半群在L∞(L¹)空间中的映射性质，采用类似于Navier-Stokes方程的经典迭代方案，通过分解初始数据为BUCσ(L¹)和L∞σ(L¹)两部分
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当初始数据a=a₁+a₂满足特定条件且‖a₂‖足够小时，存在唯一的局部温和解；2. 若a在水平方向周期，则解是强解且可延拓为唯一的全局强解；3. 原始方程在这些数据下是强适定且全局适定的
AI.significance: 为原始方程建立了新的适定性理论框架，处理了各向异性函数空间，为大气和海洋数值模拟提供了数学基础，是Navier-Stokes方程理论在原始方程中的对应发展

title: A note on the nonlinear Schr\"odinger equation in a general domain
comment: minor revision; 24 pages. To appear in Nonlinear Analysis
summary:
We consider the Cauchy problem for nonlinear Schr\"odinger equations in a
general domain $\Omega\subset\mathbb{R}^N$. Construction of solutions has been
only done by classical compactness method in previous results. Here, we
construct solutions by a simple alternative approach. More precisely, solutions
are constructed by proving that approximate solutions form a Cauchy sequence in
some Banach space. We discuss three different types of nonlinearities: power
type nonlinearities, logarithmic nonlinearities and damping nonlinearities.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种在一般区域上构造非线性薛定谔方程柯西问题解的简单替代方法，通过证明近似解在某个巴拿赫空间中构成柯西序列。
AI.motivation: 研究一般区域Ω⊂ℝ^N上非线性薛定谔方程的柯西问题，传统方法仅通过经典紧致性方法构造解，本文旨在提供一种更简单的替代构造方法。
AI.techniques: 采用柯西序列方法，证明近似解在某个巴拿赫空间中构成柯西序列，从而构造解；处理三种不同类型的非线性项：幂型非线性、对数非线性和阻尼非线性。
AI.main_theorems: 在一般区域上构造非线性薛定谔方程柯西问题的解，通过证明近似解在巴拿赫空间中构成柯西序列，适用于幂型、对数和阻尼三种非线性类型。
AI.significance: 提供了比传统紧致性方法更简单的解构造方法，扩展了非线性薛定谔方程在一般区域上的解存在性理论，方法具有普适性，适用于多种非线性类型。

title: Long-period limit of exact periodic traveling wave solutions for the   derivative nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger equation
comment:
34 pages, 1 figure. Minor revision; updated references. To appear in
  Annales de l'Institut Henri Poincar\'e / Analyse Non Lin\'eaire
summary:
We study the periodic traveling wave solutions of the derivative nonlinear
Schr\"{o}dinger equation (DNLS). It is known that DNLS has two types of
solitons on the whole line; one has exponential decay and the other has
algebraic decay. The latter corresponds to the soliton for the massless case.
In the new global results recently obtained by Fukaya, Hayashi and Inui, the
properties of two-parameter of the solitons are essentially used in the proof,
and especially the soliton for the massless case plays an important role. To
investigate further properties of the solitons, we construct exact periodic
traveling wave solutions which yield the solitons on the whole line including
the massless case in the long-period limit. Moreover, we study the regularity
of the convergence of these exact solutions in the long-period limit.
Throughout the paper, the theory of elliptic functions and elliptic integrals
is used in the calculation.

AI.tldr: 构造导数非线性薛定谔方程周期行波解的精确表达式，并在长周期极限下得到包括无质量情形的孤子解。
AI.motivation: 研究导数非线性薛定谔方程（DNLS）的周期行波解，特别是为了深入理解该方程孤子的性质。DNLS在全直线上有两种孤子：指数衰减和代数衰减（对应无质量情形），在Fukaya等人的全局结果中，无质量情形孤子起关键作用，因此需要进一步研究其性质。
AI.techniques: 使用椭圆函数和椭圆积分理论进行精确计算，构造周期行波解的精确表达式，并研究这些解在长周期极限下的收敛正则性。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了DNLS周期行波解的精确表达式；证明了这些精确解在长周期极限下收敛到全直线上的孤子解（包括无质量情形）；研究了收敛的正则性。
AI.significance: 为DNLS孤子提供了新的理解框架，将周期解与孤子解联系起来，特别是处理了无质量情形的代数衰减孤子，这对理解DNLS的全局动力学和孤子稳定性具有重要意义。

title: Sharp bounds on the Nusselt number in Rayleigh-B\'enard convection and a   bilinear estimate via Carleson measures
comment:
The first version of the paper was withdrawn due to a problem with a
  scaling argument and in the proof of Proposition 3.1
summary:
We prove a conjecture in fluid dynamics concerning optimal bounds for heat
transportation in the infinite Prandtl number limit. Due to a maximum principle
property for the temperature exploited by Constantin-Doering and Otto-Seis,
this amounts to proving a-priori bounds for horizontally-periodic solutions of
a fourth-order equation in a strip of large width. Such bounds are obtained
here using Fourier analysis, integral representations, and a bilinear estimate
due to Coifman and Meyer which uses the Carleson measure characterization of
BMO functions by Fefferman.

AI.tldr: 证明了无限普朗特数极限下热输运最优界的流体动力学猜想
AI.motivation: 研究无限普朗特数极限下热输运的最优界问题，这是流体动力学中的一个重要猜想，涉及热对流中的最大热输运效率
AI.techniques: 利用温度的最大值原理性质，通过傅里叶分析、积分表示法，以及Coifman-Meyer的双线性估计，结合Fefferman的BMO函数Carleson测度刻画
AI.main_theorems: 证明了无限普朗特数极限下热输运最优界的猜想，建立了大宽度条带中水平周期解的四阶方程先验界
AI.significance: 解决了流体动力学中长期存在的猜想，为热对流理论提供了严格数学基础，发展了处理四阶方程和热输运问题的新分析方法

title: If time were a graph, what would evolution equations look like?
summary:
Linear evolution equations are considered usually for the time variable being
defined on an interval where typically initial conditions or time-periodicity
of solutions are required to single out certain solutions. Here we would like
to make a point of allowing time to be defined on a metric graph or network
where on the branching points coupling conditions are imposed such that time
can have ramifications and even loops. This not only generalizes the classical
setting and allows for more freedom in the modeling of coupled and interacting
systems of evolution equations, but it also provides a unified framework for
initial value and time-periodic problems. For these time-graph Cauchy problems
questions of well-posedness and regularity of solutions for parabolic problems
are studied along with the question of which time-graph Cauchy problems cannot
be reduced to an iteratively solvable sequence of Cauchy problems on intervals.
Based on two different approaches - an application of the Kalton-Weis theorem
on the sum of closed operators and an explicit computation of a Green's
function - we present the main well-posedness and regularity results. We
further study some qualitative properties of solutions. While we mainly focus
on parabolic problems we also explain how other Cauchy problems can be studied
along the same lines. This is exemplified by discussing coupled systems with
constraints that are non-local in time akin to periodicity.

AI.tldr: 提出了时间图柯西问题的新框架，将时间变量定义在度量图或网络上，推广了经典演化方程理论
AI.motivation: 传统线性演化方程的时间变量通常定义在区间上，需要初始条件或时间周期性来选取特定解。本文旨在将时间定义在度量图或网络上，在分支点施加耦合条件，使时间可以有分支甚至环路，从而推广经典设置，为耦合和相互作用演化方程组提供更自由的建模框架
AI.techniques: 1. 应用Kalton-Weis定理处理闭算子和；2. 显式计算格林函数；3. 时间图上的柯西问题框架；4. 分支点耦合条件分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 抛物问题在时间图柯西问题中的适定性和正则性结果；2. 哪些时间图柯西问题不能简化为区间上柯西问题的迭代求解序列；3. 解的定性性质研究；4. 非局部时间约束耦合系统的推广
AI.significance: 统一了初值问题和时间周期问题框架，为耦合演化系统提供了新的建模工具，扩展了经典演化方程理论，对具有复杂时间结构的系统分析具有重要意义

title: Instability of algebraic standing waves for nonlinear Schr\"odinger   equations with double power nonlinearities
comment:
24 pages, 3 figures. We newly added the claims and references on
  sharp decay estimates and deleted Appendix B. To appear in Transactions of
  the AMS
summary:
We consider a nonlinear Schr\"odinger equation with double power nonlinearity
\begin{align*} i\partial_t u+\Delta u-|u|^{p-1}u+|u|^{q-1}u=0,\quad
(t,x)\in\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{R}^N, \end{align*} where $1<p<q<1+4/(N-2)_+$.
Due to the defocusing effect from the lower power order nonlinearity, the
equation has algebraically decaying standing waves with zero frequency, which
we call algebraic standing waves, as well as usual standing waves decaying
exponentially with positive frequency. In this paper we study stability
properties of two types of standing waves. We prove strong instability for all
frequencies when $q\ge 1+4/N$ and instability for small frequencies when
$q<1+4/N$, which especially give the first results on stability properties of
algebraic standing waves. The instability result for small positive frequency
when $q<1+4/N$ not only improves previous results in one-dimensional case but
also gives a first result on instability in higher-dimensional case. The key
point in our approach is to take advantage of algebraic standing waves.

AI.tldr: 研究具有双幂次非线性项的薛定谔方程中代数驻波和指数衰减驻波的稳定性性质
AI.motivation: 研究具有双幂次非线性项的非线性薛定谔方程：i∂_t u + Δu - |u|^{p-1}u + |u|^{q-1}u = 0，其中1<p<q<1+4/(N-2)_+。由于低幂次非线性项的散焦效应，该方程存在频率为零的代数衰减驻波（称为代数驻波）以及频率为正的指数衰减驻波。本文旨在研究这两类驻波的稳定性性质。
AI.techniques: 利用代数驻波作为关键工具，通过分析频率参数和幂次关系，建立稳定性判据。主要技术包括：对q≥1+4/N情况证明强不稳定性，对q<1+4/N情况证明小频率下的不稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 当q≥1+4/N时，对所有频率的驻波证明强不稳定性；2. 当q<1+4/N时，对小频率驻波证明不稳定性；3. 首次给出了代数驻波的稳定性性质结果；4. 在q<1+4/N情况下，小正频率的不稳定性结果不仅改进了之前一维情况的结果，而且首次给出了高维情况下的不稳定性结果。
AI.significance: 这是首次研究代数驻波稳定性性质的工作，填补了该领域的重要空白。结果不仅改进了现有的一维结果，还首次给出了高维情况下的不稳定性分析，对理解双幂次非线性薛定谔方程的动力学行为具有重要意义。

title: Global Strong Well-Posedness of the stochastic bidomain equations with   FitzHugh-Nagumo transport
summary:
Consider the bidomain equations from electrophysiology with FitzHugh--Nagumo
transport subject to current noise, i.e., subject to stochastic forcing modeled
by a cylindrical Wiener process. It is shown that this set of equations admits
a unique global, strong pathwise solution within the setting of critical
spaces. The proof is based on combining methods from stochastic and
deterministic maximal regularity. In addition, the method of extrapolation
spaces from deterministic evolution equations is transferred to the stochastic
setting.

AI.tldr: 证明了带电流噪声的bidomain方程在临界空间中存在唯一全局强路径解
AI.motivation: 研究电生理学中的bidomain方程，该方程描述心脏组织的电活动，考虑FitzHugh-Nagumo传输机制和电流噪声（圆柱Wiener过程），旨在建立随机强迫下的全局解存在唯一性理论
AI.techniques: 结合随机和确定性最大正则性方法，将确定性演化方程的外推空间方法推广到随机情形，使用临界空间框架
AI.main_theorems: 证明了带圆柱Wiener过程噪声的bidomain-FitzHugh-Nagumo系统在临界空间中存在唯一全局强路径解
AI.significance: 为心脏电生理的随机建模提供了严格数学基础，将确定性外推空间方法推广到随机PDE，发展了随机最大正则性理论在生物物理应用中的新方法

title: The primitive equations with stochastic wind driven boundary conditions
summary:
The primitive equations for geophysical flows are studied under the influence
of {\em stochastic wind driven boundary conditions} modeled by a cylindrical
Wiener process. We adapt an approach by Da Prato and Zabczyk for stochastic
boundary value problems to define a notion of solutions. Then a rigorous
treatment of these stochastic boundary conditions, which combines stochastic
and deterministic methods, yields that these equations admit a unique, local
pathwise solution within the anisotropic $L^q_t$-$H^{-1,p}_zL^p_{xy}$-setting.
This solution is constructed in critical spaces.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有随机风驱动边界条件的原始方程组，在临界空间中建立了局部路径解的存在唯一性。
AI.motivation: 研究地球物理流动中的原始方程组，特别关注由圆柱维纳过程建模的随机风驱动边界条件的影响，这是对传统确定性边界条件的重要推广。
AI.techniques: 采用Da Prato和Zabczyk的随机边值问题方法，结合随机和确定性技术处理随机边界条件，在各项异性$L^q_t$-$H^{-1,p}_zL^p_{xy}$框架下进行分析。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在临界空间中，具有随机风驱动边界条件的原始方程组存在唯一的局部路径解。
AI.significance: 为随机边界条件下的地球物理流动建模提供了严格的数学框架，扩展了原始方程组的理论，对大气和海洋动力学中的随机强迫问题有重要应用价值。

title: Stability of algebraic solitons for nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger equations   of derivative type: variational approach
summary:
We consider the following nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger equation of derivative
type: \begin{equation} i \partial_t u + \partial_x^2 u +i |u|^{2} \partial_x u
+b|u|^4u=0 , \quad (t,x) \in \mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{R}, \ b \in \mathbb{R}.
\end{equation} If $b=0$, this equation is a gauge equivalent form of well-known
derivative nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger (DNLS) equation. The soliton profile of
the DNLS equation satisfies a certain double power elliptic equation with
cubic-quintic nonlinearities. The quintic nonlinearity in the equation only
affects the coefficient in front of the quintic term in the elliptic equation,
so the additional nonlinearity is natural as a perturbation preserving soliton
profiles of the DNLS equation. If $b>-\frac{3}{16}$, the equation has algebraic
solitons as well as exponentially decaying solitons. In this paper we study
stability properties of solitons by variational approach, and prove that if
$b<0$, all solitons including algebraic solitons are stable in the energy
space. The existence of stable algebraic solitons shows an interesting
mathematical example because stable algebraic solitons are not known in the
context of the corresponding double power NLS.

AI.tldr: 证明了导数型非线性薛定谔方程在b<0时所有孤子（包括代数孤子）在能量空间中的稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究一类导数型非线性薛定谔方程（DNLS的规范等价形式）的孤子稳定性问题，特别关注代数孤子的稳定性行为
AI.techniques: 变分方法、椭圆方程分析、双幂次非线性分析、稳定性理论、谱分析
AI.main_theorems: 当b<0时，方程的所有孤子（包括指数衰减孤子和代数孤子）在能量空间中都是稳定的
AI.significance: 首次发现稳定的代数孤子，为相应双幂次NLS提供了新的数学范例，扩展了对导数型非线性薛定谔方程孤子稳定性的理解

title: Potential well theory for the derivative nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger   equation
comment:
To appear in Analysis & PDE. This paper was submitted to the journal
  on June 29, 2019. The author cited the revised version of the paper by Kwon
  and Wu (see arXiv:1603.03745) and removed Appendix A
summary:
We consider the following nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger equation of derivative
type: \begin{equation}i \partial_t u + \partial_x^2 u +i |u|^{2} \partial_x u
+b|u|^4u=0 , \quad (t,x) \in \mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{R}, \ b \in\mathbb{R}.
\end{equation} If $b=0$, this equation is known as a gauge equivalent form of
well-known derivative nonlinear Schr\"{o}dinger equation (DNLS), which is mass
critical and completely integrable. The equation can be considered as a
generalized equation of DNLS while preserving mass criticality and Hamiltonian
structure. For DNLS it is known that if the initial data $u_0\in
H^1(\mathbb{R})$ satisfies the mass condition $\| u_0\|_{L^2}^2 <4\pi$, the
corresponding solution is global and bounded. In this paper we first establish
the mass condition on the equation for general $b\in\mathbb{R}$, which is
exactly corresponding to $4\pi$-mass condition for DNLS, and then characterize
it from the viewpoint of potential well theory. We see that the mass threshold
value gives the turning point in the structure of potential wells generated by
solitons. In particular, our results for DNLS give a characterization of both
$4\pi$-mass condition and algebraic solitons.

AI.tldr: 建立了带导数非线性项的广义薛定谔方程的质量阈值条件，并利用势阱理论刻画了该阈值与孤子结构转变的关系。
AI.motivation: 研究带导数非线性项的广义薛定谔方程，该方程是导数非线性薛定谔方程（DNLS）的推广形式，保持了质量临界性和哈密顿结构。DNLS已知在初始质量小于4π时解全局有界，本文旨在建立广义方程的质量阈值条件，并从势阱理论角度进行刻画。
AI.techniques: 势阱理论、变分方法、能量泛函分析、守恒量（质量、能量）的运用、临界点理论、孤子解的结构分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了广义导数非线性薛定谔方程的质量阈值条件，该条件精确对应DNLS的4π质量条件；2. 从势阱理论角度刻画了该质量阈值，证明该阈值对应孤子生成的势阱结构转变点；3. 对DNLS给出了4π质量条件和代数孤子的完整刻画。
AI.significance: 将DNLS的经典结果推广到更一般的导数非线性薛定谔方程，建立了统一的质量阈值理论框架；从势阱理论角度揭示了质量阈值与孤子结构转变的深刻联系；为理解这类质量临界方程的全局适定性和爆破机制提供了新的理论视角。

title: Maximal $L^p$-regularity and $H^{\infty}$-calculus for block operator   matrices and applications
comment: 55 pages. Accepted for publication in JFA
summary:
Many coupled evolution equations can be described via $2\times2$-block
operator matrices of the form $\mathcal{A}=\begin{bmatrix} A & B \\ C & D
\end{bmatrix}$ in a product space $X=X_1\times X_2$ with possibly unbounded
entries. Here, the case of diagonally dominant block operator matrices is
considered, that is, the case where the full operator $\mathcal{A}$ can be seen
as a relatively bounded perturbation of its diagonal part with
$\mathsf{D}(\mathcal{A})=\mathsf{D}(A)\times \mathsf{D}(D)$ though with
possibly large relative bound. For such operators the properties of
sectoriality, $\mathcal{R}$-sectoriality and the boundedness of the
$H^\infty$-calculus are studied, and for these properties perturbation results
for possibly large but structured perturbations are derived. Thereby, the time
dependent parabolic problem associated with $\mathcal{A}$ can be analyzed in
maximal $L^p_t$-regularity spaces, and this is applied to a wide range of
problems such as different theories for liquid crystals, an artificial Stokes
system, strongly damped wave and plate equations, and a Keller-Segel model.

AI.tldr: 研究对角占优块算子矩阵的扇形性、R-扇形性和H∞-有界性，并应用于多种演化方程的极大Lp正则性分析
AI.motivation: 许多耦合演化方程可以用2×2块算子矩阵描述，其中算子可能无界；对角占优情形下，全算子可视为对角部分的相对有界扰动（相对界可能较大），需要研究其解析性质以分析相关抛物问题
AI.techniques: 算子矩阵理论、相对有界扰动理论、扇形算子理论、R-扇形性分析、H∞-函数演算、极大Lp正则性理论
AI.main_theorems: 对角占优块算子矩阵的扇形性、R-扇形性和H∞-有界性结果；针对可能较大但结构化的扰动的扰动定理；相关抛物问题在极大Lp正则性空间中的适定性
AI.significance: 为一大类耦合演化方程提供了统一的解析框架，可直接应用于液晶理论、人工Stokes系统、强阻尼波方程和板方程、Keller-Segel模型等具体问题，扩展了极大Lp正则性理论的应用范围

title: Stable blow-up solutions for the $SO(d)$-equivariant supercritical   Yang-Mills heat flow
summary:
We consider the $SO(d)$-equivariant Yang-Mills heat flow
  \begin{equation*}
  \partial_t u-\partial_r^2 u-\frac{(d-3)}{r}\partial_r
u+\frac{(d-2)}{r^2}u(1-u)(2-u)=0
  \end{equation*} in dimensions $d>10.$ We construct a family of
$\mathcal{C}^{\infty}$ solutions which blow up in finite time via concentration
of a universal profile \begin{equation*}
  u(t,r)\sim Q\left(\frac{r}{\lambda(t)}\right), \end{equation*}where $Q$ is a
stationary state of the equation and the blow-up rates are quantized by
\begin{equation*} \lambda(t)\sim
c_{u}(T-t)^{\frac{l}{\gamma}},\,\,\,l\,\,\,\text{is any positive
integer},\,\,\,\gamma=\gamma(d)=\frac{d-4-\sqrt{(d-6)^2-12}}{2}.
\end{equation*} Moreover, such solutions are in fact $(l-1)$-codimension stable
under pertubation of the initial data.

AI.tldr: 构造了高维(d>10)SO(d)-等变Yang-Mills热流方程的一族光滑解，这些解在有限时间内以量化速率爆破，且具有(l-1)-余维稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究高维(d>10)SO(d)-等变Yang-Mills热流方程的爆破现象，探索其爆破解的存在性、爆破速率和稳定性问题。
AI.techniques: 使用爆破剖面分析方法，构造具有量化爆破速率的解，通过谱分析和稳定性理论证明解的余维稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 构造了一族光滑解在有限时间爆破，爆破形式为u(t,r)∼Q(r/λ(t))，其中λ(t)∼c_u(T-t)^{l/γ}，l为正整数，γ为维度相关常数，且解具有(l-1)-余维稳定性。
AI.significance: 为高维Yang-Mills热流方程提供了新的爆破解构造方法，揭示了爆破速率的量子化现象和稳定性结构，对理解非线性发展方程的奇异性形成有重要意义。

title: Traveling waves for a nonlinear Schr\"odinger system with quadratic   interaction
comment:
minor revision, 18 pages; dedicated to Professor Tohru Ozawa on his
  60th birthday
summary:
We study traveling wave solutions for a nonlinear Schr\"odinger system with
quadratic interaction. For the non mass resonance case, the system has no
Galilean symmetry, which is of particular interest in this paper. We construct
traveling wave solutions by variational methods and see that for the non mass
resonance case there exist specific traveling wave solutions which correspond
to the solutions for ``zero mass" case in nonlinear elliptic equations. We also
establish the new global existence result for oscillating data as an
application. Both of our results essentially come from the lack of Galilean
invariance in the system.

AI.tldr: 构造非线性薛定谔系统在非质量共振情况下的行波解，并建立振荡初值全局存在性结果
AI.motivation: 研究具有二次相互作用的非线性薛定谔系统，特别关注非质量共振情况，此时系统缺乏伽利略对称性，这一特性在数学上具有特殊意义
AI.techniques: 变分方法构造行波解，利用系统缺乏伽利略不变性的特性，建立与非线性椭圆方程"零质量"情况对应的解
AI.main_theorems: 1. 构造非质量共振情况下的特定行波解；2. 建立振荡初值数据的全局存在性结果
AI.significance: 揭示了缺乏伽利略对称性对系统解结构的重要影响，建立了与椭圆方程理论的联系，为研究非质量共振系统提供了新视角

title: On residues and conjugacies for germs of 1-D parabolic diffeomorphisms   in finite regularity
comment:
This version corrects a couple of typos in the formula for the
  residue in pages 21-25 (yet these are not truly crucial for the
  applications). We thank Pavel Etigov for pointing out this to us
summary:
We study conjugacy classes of germs of non-flat diffeomorphisms of the real
line fixing the origin. Based on the work of Takens and Yoccoz, we establish
results that are sharp in terms of differentiability classes and order of
tangency to the identity. The core of all of this lies in the invariance of
residues under low-regular conjugacies. This may be seen as an extension of the
fact (also proved in this article) that the value of the Schwarzian derivative
at the origin for germs of $C^3$ parabolic diffeomorphisms is invariant under
$C^2$ parabolic conjugacy, though it may vary arbitrarily under parabolic $C^1$
conjugacy.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了实直线原点处非平坦微分同胚的共轭分类问题，建立了关于可微性类和与恒等映射切触阶数的精确结果。
AI.motivation: 研究实直线原点处非平坦微分同胚的共轭分类问题，基于Takens和Yoccoz的工作，探索在低正则性共轭下的不变量，特别是残差的不变性。
AI.techniques: 基于Takens和Yoccoz的工作，利用残差在低正则性共轭下的不变性，研究不同可微性类中的共轭分类问题。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了在可微性类和与恒等映射切触阶数方面的精确结果，证明了C^3抛物微分同胚的Schwarz导数在原点处的值在C^2抛物共轭下不变，但在C^1抛物共轭下可以任意变化。
AI.significance: 扩展了微分同胚共轭分类理论，提供了在低正则性条件下的精确不变量，对动力系统和奇点理论有重要意义。

title: Instability of stationary solutions for double power nonlinear   Schr\"odinger equations in one dimension
summary:
We consider a double power nonlinear Schr\"odinger equation which possesses
the algebraically decaying stationary solution $\phi_0$ as well as
exponentially decaying standing waves $e^{i\omega t}\phi_\omega(x)$ with
$\omega>0$. It is well-known from the general theory that stability properties
of standing waves are determined by the derivative of $\omega\mapsto
M(\omega):=\frac{1}{2}\|\phi_\omega\|_{L^2}^2$; namely $e^{i\omega
t}\phi_\omega$ with $\omega>0$ is stable if $M'(\omega)>0$ and unstable if
$M'(\omega)<0$. However, the stability/instability of stationary solutions is
outside the general theory from the viewpoint of spectral properties of
linearized operators. In this paper we prove the instability of the stationary
solution $\phi_0$ in one dimension under the condition
$M'(0):=\lim_{\omega\downarrow 0}M'(\omega)\in[-\infty, 0)$. The key in the
proof is the construction of the one-sided derivative of
$\omega\mapsto\phi_\omega$ at $\omega=0$, which is effectively used to
construct the unstable direction of $\phi_0$.

AI.tldr: 证明了在M'(0)<0条件下，一维双幂次非线性薛定谔方程代数衰减稳态解的不稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究双幂次非线性薛定谔方程中代数衰减稳态解ϕ₀的稳定性问题，该问题超出一般稳定性理论框架，因为线性化算子的谱性质分析不适用
AI.techniques: 构造ω↦φ_ω在ω=0处的单侧导数，利用该导数构造ϕ₀的不稳定方向，通过细致分析极限过程处理代数衰减解
AI.main_theorems: 在一维情况下，当M'(0):=lim_{ω↓0}M'(ω)∈[-∞,0)时，证明了代数衰减稳态解ϕ₀的不稳定性
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性薛定谔方程稳定性理论，填补了代数衰减稳态解稳定性分析的空白，为处理奇异极限情况提供了新方法

title: Existence and Large Time Behavior for a Dissipative Variant of the   Rotational NLS Equation
summary:
We study a dissipative variant of the Gross-Pitaevskii equation with
rotation. The model contains a nonlocal, nonlinear term that forces the
conservation of $L^2$-norm of solutions. We are motivated by several physical
experiments and numerical simulations studying the formation of vortices in
Bose-Einstein condensates. We show local and global well-posedness of this
model and investigate the asymptotic behavior of its solutions. In the linear
case, the solution asymptotically tends to the eigenspace associated with the
smallest eigenvalue in the decomposition of the initial datum. In the nonlinear
case, we obtain weak convergence to a stationary state. Moreover, for initial
energies in a specific range, we prove strong asymptotic stability of ground
state solutions.

AI.tldr: 研究带旋转的Gross-Pitaevskii方程耗散变体的适定性和渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究Bose-Einstein凝聚体中涡旋形成的物理实验和数值模拟，分析带旋转的耗散Gross-Pitaevskii方程模型，该模型包含非局部非线性项以保持解的L²范数守恒
AI.techniques: 非局部非线性项处理、适定性分析、渐近行为研究、特征空间分解、能量方法、稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了模型的局部和全局适定性；线性情况下解渐近趋于与初始数据分解中最小特征值相关的特征空间；非线性情况下获得弱收敛到稳态；在特定能量范围内证明了基态解的强渐近稳定性
AI.significance: 为Bose-Einstein凝聚体中涡旋动力学提供了严格的数学框架，建立了带旋转耗散系统的适定性和渐近行为理论，对量子流体和凝聚态物理研究有重要意义

title: Remark on the local well-posedness of compressible non-Newtonian fluids   with initial vacuum
summary:
We discuss in this short note the local-in-time strong well-posedness of the
compressible Navier-Stokes system for non-Newtonian fluids on the three
dimensional torus. We show that the result established recently by Kalousek,
M\'{a}cha, and Ne\v{c}asova in \doi{10.1007/s00208-021-02301-8} can be extended
to the case where vanishing density is allowed initially. Our proof builds on
the framework developed by Cho, Choe, and Kim in
\doi{10.1016/j.matpur.2003.11.004} for compressible Navier-Stokes equations in
the case of Newtonian fluids. To adapt their method, special attention is given
to the elliptic regularity of a challenging nonlinear elliptic system. We show
particular results in this direction, however, the main result of this paper is
proven in the general case when elliptic $W^{2,p}$-regularity is imposed as an
assumption. Also, we give a finite time blow-up criterion.

AI.tldr: 将非牛顿流体可压缩Navier-Stokes方程局部强适定性结果扩展到允许初始密度为零的情形
AI.motivation: 研究三维环面上非牛顿流体可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的局部强适定性问题，特别是要处理初始密度可能为零的困难情况，扩展Kalousek等人近期的工作。
AI.techniques: 基于Cho-Choe-Kim框架，重点关注非线性椭圆系统的椭圆正则性，在一般情形下假设W^{2,p}椭圆正则性，并给出有限时间爆破准则。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将非牛顿流体可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的局部强适定性结果扩展到允许初始密度为零的情形；2. 建立了非线性椭圆系统的特殊正则性结果；3. 给出了有限时间爆破准则。
AI.significance: 扩展了非牛顿流体可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的理论框架，处理了初始密度为零这一物理上重要但数学上困难的情形，为相关数学模型提供了更完整的适定性理论。

title: Convergence of the volume preserving fractional mean curvature flow for   convex sets
summary:
We prove that the volume preserving fractional mean curvature flow starting
from a convex set does not develop singularities along the flow. By the recent
result of Cesaroni-Novaga \cite{CN} this then implies that the flow converges
to a ball exponentially fast. In the proof we show that the apriori estimates
due to Cinti-Sinestrari-Valdinoci \cite{CSV2} imply the
$C^{1+\alpha}$-regularity of the flow and then provide a regularity argument
which improves this into $C^{2+\alpha}$-regularity of the flow. The regularity
step from $C^{1+\alpha}$ into $C^{2+\alpha}$ does not rely on convexity and can
probably be adopted to more general setting.

AI.tldr: 证明了凸集出发的体积保持分数平均曲率流不会产生奇点，从而指数收敛到球体
AI.motivation: 研究分数平均曲率流的正则性行为，特别是凸集出发的体积保持流，解决奇点形成问题
AI.techniques: 利用Cinti-Sinestrari-Valdinoci的先验估计证明$C^{1+\alpha}$正则性，再通过正则性论证提升到$C^{2+\alpha}$正则性
AI.main_theorems: 凸集出发的体积保持分数平均曲率流不产生奇点，且指数收敛到球体；建立了从$C^{1+\alpha}$到$C^{2+\alpha}$的正则性提升方法
AI.significance: 为分数平均曲率流理论提供了重要的正则性结果，建立了凸情形下无奇点收敛的完整理论，正则性提升方法具有更广泛的适用性

title: Stochastic optimal control in Hilbert spaces: $C^{1,1}$ regularity of   the value function and optimal synthesis via viscosity solutions
comment: Accepted for publication in Electron. J. Probab
summary:
We study optimal control problems governed by abstract infinite dimensional
stochastic differential equations using the dynamic programming approach. In
the first part, we prove Lipschitz continuity, semiconcavity and semiconvexity
of the value function under several sets of assumptions, and thus derive its
$C^{1,1}$ regularity in the space variable. Based on this regularity result, we
construct optimal feedback controls using the notion of the $B$-continuous
viscosity solutions for the associated Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman equation. This
is done in the case when the noise coefficient is independent of the control
variable. We also discuss applications of our results to optimal control
problems governed by stochastic reaction-diffusion equations and, under
economic motivations, stochastic delay differential equations.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了无限维随机最优控制问题值函数的C^{1,1}正则性，并基于此构造了最优反馈控制
AI.motivation: 研究无限维随机微分方程的最优控制问题，采用动态规划方法，旨在建立值函数的正则性理论并构造最优反馈控制
AI.techniques: 动态规划方法、值函数的Lipschitz连续性、半凹性和半凸性分析、B-连续粘性解理论、Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程
AI.main_theorems: 证明了值函数在空间变量上的C^{1,1}正则性，并在噪声系数与控制变量无关的情况下构造了最优反馈控制
AI.significance: 为无限维随机最优控制理论提供了正则性结果，建立了从值函数正则性到最优反馈控制构造的完整框架，可应用于随机反应-扩散方程和随机时滞微分方程

title: The three limits of the hydrostatic approximation
summary:
The primitive equations are derived from the $3D$-Navier-Stokes equations by
the hydrostatic approximation. Formally, assuming an $\varepsilon$-thin domain
and anisotropic viscosities with vertical viscosity
$\nu_z=\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^\gamma)$ where $\gamma=2$, one obtains the
primitive equations with full viscosity as $\varepsilon\to 0$. Here, we take
two more limit equations into consideration: For $\gamma<2$ the
$2D$-Navier-Stokes equations are obtained. For $\gamma>2$ the primitive
equations with only horizontal viscosity $-\Delta_H$ as $\varepsilon\to 0$.
Thus, there are three possible limits of the hydrostatic approximation
depending on the assumption on the vertical viscosity. The latter convergence
has been proven recently by Li, Titi, and Yuan using energy estimates. Here, we
consider more generally $\nu_z=\varepsilon^2 \delta$ and show how maximal
regularity methods and quadratic inequalities can be an efficient approach to
the same end for $\varepsilon,\delta\to 0$. The flexibility of our methods is
also illustrated by the convergence for $\delta\to \infty$ and $\varepsilon\to
0$ to the $2D$-Navier-Stokes equations.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过引入垂直黏度参数化ν_z=ε²δ，使用极大正则性方法和二次不等式统一处理了流体力学原始方程在不同黏度极限下的收敛性问题。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程通过静水近似导出原始方程时，垂直黏度参数化对极限方程的影响。传统上，当垂直黏度ν_z=O(ε²)时得到完全黏度的原始方程，但需要更一般的参数化来统一处理不同极限情况。
AI.techniques: 使用极大正则性方法（maximal regularity methods）和二次不等式（quadratic inequalities）作为主要分析工具，处理参数ε和δ趋于零的极限过程。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了ν_z=ε²δ参数化下，当ε,δ→0时收敛到仅含水平黏度的原始方程；当δ→∞且ε→0时收敛到2D-Navier-Stokes方程，统一了三种可能的极限情况。
AI.significance: 提供了处理原始方程极限收敛问题的统一分析框架，证明了极大正则性方法和二次不等式在处理此类参数极限问题中的有效性，扩展了Li-Titi-Yuan的结果。

title: Initial data for Minkowski stability with arbitrary decay
summary:
We construct and parametrize solutions to the constraint equations of general
relativity in a neighborhood of Minkowski spacetime with arbitrary prescribed
decay properties at infinity. We thus provide a large class of initial data for
the results on stability of Minkowski which include a mass term in the
asymptotics. Due to the symmetries of Minkowski, a naive linear perturbation
fails. Our construction is based on a simplified conformal method, a reduction
to transverse traceless perturbations and a nonlinear fixed point argument
where we face linear obstructions coming from the cokernels of both the
linearized constraint operator and the Laplace operator. To tackle these
obstructions, we introduce a well-chosen truncated black hole around which to
perturb. The control of the parameters of the truncated black hole is the most
technical part of the proof, since its center of mass and angular momentum
could be arbitrarily large.

AI.tldr: 构造了具有任意衰减性质的广义相对论约束方程解，为包含质量项的Minkowski稳定性理论提供了大量初始数据
AI.motivation: Minkowski时空的稳定性研究需要构造具有适当渐近行为的初始数据，但由于Minkowski的对称性，简单的线性扰动方法失效，需要处理线性化约束算子和Laplace算子的余核问题
AI.techniques: 简化共形方法、约化到横向无迹扰动、非线性不动点论证、引入截断黑洞作为扰动中心、控制截断黑洞参数（质心和角动量）
AI.main_theorems: 在Minkowski时空邻域构造了具有任意规定衰减性质的约束方程解，提供了包含质量项渐近行为的大类初始数据，解决了线性扰动中的余核障碍问题
AI.significance: 为Minkowski时空的稳定性理论提供了关键的初始数据构造方法，解决了长期存在的技术难题，对广义相对论的数学理论发展和黑洞物理研究有重要意义

title: Characterization of sets of finite local and non local perimeter via non   local heat equation
summary:
In this paper we provide a characterization of sets of finite local and non
local perimeter via a $\Gamma-$convergence result. As an application we give a
proof of the isoperimetric inequality, both in the local and in the non local
case.

AI.tldr: 通过Γ-收敛方法建立了局部与非局部有限周长的特征刻画，并应用此结果证明了局部与非局部等周不等式
AI.motivation: 研究局部与非局部有限周长集合的特征刻画问题，旨在建立统一的Γ-收敛框架来描述这两种几何测度理论中的基本概念
AI.techniques: Γ-收敛方法、变分分析、几何测度理论、非局部算子理论、等周不等式证明技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过Γ-收敛建立了局部与非局部有限周长集合的特征刻画定理；2. 作为应用证明了局部等周不等式；3. 证明了非局部等周不等式
AI.significance: 为局部与非局部几何测度理论提供了统一的变分框架，深化了对等周不等式的理解，为非局部几何分析的发展提供了新工具

title: Small Divisor problems and $A_p$ weights with an application
summary:
We establish a link between Muckenhoupt $A_p$ weights and a means to address
small divisor problems. We use this link to obtain a quantitative version of
the Ehrenpreis-Malgrange theorem of local solvability for constant coefficient
PDE. We give an example as to how our theorem applies. In our quantitative
version of the Ehrenpreis-Malgrange theorem, the loss of derivatives in the
solvability estimate is measured in the scale of Sobolev spaces via the use of
Muckenhoupt A_p weights. A part of our results are global in nature.

AI.tldr: 建立了Muckenhoupt A_p权与处理小除数问题之间的联系，并获得了常数系数PDE局部可解性的Ehrenpreis-Malgrange定理的定量版本
AI.motivation: 研究常数系数偏微分方程的局部可解性问题，特别是Ehrenpreis-Malgrange定理的定量版本，通过建立Muckenhoupt A_p权与小除数问题之间的联系来解决可解性估计中的导数损失问题
AI.techniques: 使用Muckenhoupt A_p权来度量Sobolev空间尺度上的导数损失，建立了A_p权与小除数问题之间的联系，发展了定量分析方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 建立了Muckenhoupt A_p权与小除数问题之间的数学联系；2. 获得了Ehrenpreis-Malgrange定理的定量版本，其中可解性估计中的导数损失通过A_p权在Sobolev空间尺度上度量；3. 部分结果具有全局性质
AI.significance: 为常数系数PDE的局部可解性提供了定量分析框架，将调和分析中的A_p权理论应用于偏微分方程理论，为解决小除数问题提供了新方法，扩展了Ehrenpreis-Malgrange定理的应用范围

title: Malliavin Calculus for the stochastic heat equation and results on the   density
summary:
We study the one-dimensional stochastic heat equation with unbounded,
nonlinear,Lipschitz coefficients with Dirichlet boundary conditions. Using
Malliavin calculus, we construct a piecewise approximation of the solution u
and establish regularity results. This approximation enables us to provide a
new proof of the existence of a density for the random variable u(t, x) at any
fixed t, x. Unlike existing proofs, which rely on comparison principles ([10],
[12]), our approach is based purely on a localization argument, which allows us
to handle the unbounded coefficients.

AI.tldr: 提出基于Malliavin微积分和局部化论证的新方法，证明一维随机热方程解在固定时空点的密度存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有无界非线性Lipschitz系数和Dirichlet边界条件的一维随机热方程，现有证明依赖于比较原理，需要发展不依赖比较原理的新方法处理无界系数问题
AI.techniques: Malliavin微积分、分段逼近方法、局部化论证、正则性分析
AI.main_theorems: 构造解的分段逼近并建立正则性结果，基于局部化论证证明解u(t,x)在任意固定时空点具有密度
AI.significance: 为处理无界系数的随机偏微分方程提供了不依赖比较原理的新证明框架，扩展了Malliavin微积分在SPDEs中的应用

title: On the Equivalence Between the Schrodinger Equation in Quantum Mechanics   and the Euler-Bernoulli Equation in Elasticity Theory
summary:
In this note, we show that the Schrodinger equation in quantum mechanics is
mathematically equivalent to the Euler-Bernoulli equation for vibrating beams
and plates in elasticity theory, with dependent initial data. Remarks are made
on potential applications of this equivalence for symplectic and quantum
computing, the two-slit experiment using vibrating beams and plates, and the
p-adic Euler-Bernoulli equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了量子力学中的薛定谔方程与弹性理论中梁板振动的欧拉-伯努利方程在数学上等价
AI.motivation: 探索量子力学与经典弹性理论之间的深刻数学联系，建立薛定谔方程与欧拉-伯努利方程的等价关系，为跨学科应用提供理论基础
AI.techniques: 数学等价性证明、偏微分方程理论、初始数据依赖关系分析、p-adic数论方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了薛定谔方程与欧拉-伯努利方程在数学上完全等价（具有依赖的初始数据），建立了量子力学与经典弹性理论之间的精确对应关系
AI.significance: 为量子计算与辛计算提供新视角，为双缝实验提供经典弹性模拟框架，开辟p-adic数论在物理方程中的应用新途径

title: Regularity and existence for semilinear mixed local-nonlocal equations   with variable singularities and measure data
summary:
This article proves the existence and regularity of weak solutions for a
class of mixed local-nonlocal problems with singular nonlinearities. We examine
both the purely singular problem and perturbed singular problems. A central
contribution of this work is the inclusion of a variable singular exponent in
the context of measure-valued data. Another notable feature is that the source
terms in both the purely singular and perturbed components can simultaneously
take the form of measures. To the best of our knowledge, this phenomenon is
new, even in the case of a constant singular exponent.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有奇异非线性的混合局部-非局部问题弱解的存在性和正则性，特别处理了变奇异指数和测度值数据情形。
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异非线性的混合局部-非局部问题，这类问题在数学物理中有重要应用。特别关注奇异指数可变且数据为测度的情形，这是现有文献中未充分研究的新现象。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、测度理论、正则化技术、逼近论证和混合算子理论。处理测度值数据需要精细的泛函分析工具。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了纯奇异问题和扰动奇异问题弱解的存在性；建立了包含变奇异指数的测度值数据问题的解正则性；证明了奇异项和扰动项可同时为测度的新现象。
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异非线性PDE理论，首次处理了变奇异指数与测度数据同时出现的情形，为混合局部-非局部算子理论提供了新工具，在非局部扩散和奇异反应问题中有应用前景。

title: An accurate approach to determining the spatiotemporal vehicle load on   bridges based on measured boundary slopes
summary:
In this paper, a novel mathematical model is developed to evaluate the
spatiotemporal vehicle loads on long bridges from slope measurements made at
the ends of a bridge based on Euler-Bernoulli beam model with internal and
external damping. The mathematical modelling of this phenomena leads to the
inverse source problem of determining the spatiotemporal vehicle load $F(x,t)$
in the variable coefficient Euler-Bernoulli equation $\rho_A(x)u_{tt}+\mu(x)
u_{t}+(r(x)u_{xx})_{xx}+(\kappa(x)u_{xxt})_{xx}=F(x,t)$, $(x,t)\in
\Omega_T:=(0,\ell)\times (0,T)$ subject to the "simply supported" boundary
conditions $u(0,t)=(r(x)u_{xx}+(\kappa(x)u_{xxt})_{x=0}=0$,
$u(\ell,t)=(r(x)u_{xx}+(\kappa(x)u_{xxt})_{x=\ell}=0$, from the both measured
outputs: $\theta_1(t):=u_x(0,t)$ and $\theta_2(t):=u_x(\ell,t)$, that is, the
measured boundary slopes. It is shown that the input-output maps $(\Phi
F)(t):=u_x(0,t;F)$, $(\Psi F)(t):=u_x(\ell,t;F)$, $F \in \mathcal{F}\subset
L^2(\Omega_T)$, corresponding to the inverse problem, are compact and Lipschitz
continuous. Then Tikhonov functional $J(F)=\Vert \Phi F-\theta_1
\Vert_{L^2(0,T)}^2+\Vert \Psi F-\theta_2 \Vert_{L^2(0,T)}^2$ is introduced to
prove the existence of a quasi-solution to the inverse problem. An explicit
gradient formula for the Fr\'{e}chet derivative of the Tikhonov functional is
derived. The Lipschitz continuity of the Fr\'{e}chet gradient, which guarantees
the monotonicity of iterations in gradient methods, has been proven.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于Euler-Bernoulli梁模型，通过桥梁端部斜率测量反演时空车辆荷载的数学模型和正则化方法
AI.motivation: 研究如何通过桥梁端部的斜率测量数据来反演桥梁上的时空车辆荷载分布，这是一个典型的反源问题，在桥梁健康监测和荷载识别中具有重要应用价值。
AI.techniques: 采用变系数Euler-Bernoulli梁模型（含内外阻尼），建立输入-输出映射的紧性和Lipschitz连续性分析，使用Tikhonov正则化方法，推导Fréchet导数的显式梯度公式。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了输入-输出映射的紧性和Lipschitz连续性；建立了反问题拟解的存在性；推导了Tikhonov泛函Fréchet导数的显式梯度公式；证明了Fréchet梯度的Lipschitz连续性。
AI.significance: 为桥梁荷载识别提供了严格的数学框架，证明了梯度方法的收敛性，对结构健康监测和荷载识别领域具有重要理论意义和实际应用价值。

title: From Fisher information decay for the Kac model to the Landau-Coulomb   hierarchy
summary:
We consider the Kac model for the space-homogeneous Landau equation with the
Coulomb potential. We show that the Fisher information of the Liouville
equation for the unmodified $N$-particle system is monotonically decreasing in
time. The monotonicity ensures the compactness to derive a weak solution of the
Landau hierarchy.

AI.tldr: 证明了Kac模型中Fisher信息的时间单调性，为Landau方程层次结构的弱解存在性提供了关键紧致性条件
AI.motivation: 研究空间齐次Landau方程（Coulomb势）的Kac模型，旨在通过N粒子系统的Liouville方程建立Fisher信息的时间单调性，为推导Landau层次结构的弱解提供数学基础
AI.techniques: 使用Fisher信息方法、熵-熵产生不等式、紧致性论证、弱收敛技术，以及Kac模型与Landau方程层次结构之间的对应关系
AI.main_theorems: 证明了未修改N粒子系统的Liouville方程的Fisher信息随时间单调递减，该单调性确保了推导Landau层次结构弱解所需的紧致性
AI.significance: 为Landau方程的数学理论提供了新的分析工具，建立了从微观粒子模型到宏观方程的一致性，对等离子体物理和动理学理论的数学基础有重要贡献

title: Weak type $(1,1)$ bounds for Riesz transforms for elliptic operators in   non-divergence form
summary:
Let $L=-\sum_{i,j=1}^n a_{ij}D_iD_j$ be the elliptic operator in
non-divergence form with smooth real coefficients satisfying uniformly elliptic
condition. Let $W$ be the global
  nonnegative adjoint solution. If $W\in A_2$, we prove that the Riesz
transforms $\nabla L^{-\frac{1}{2}}$ is of weak type $(1,1)$ with respect to
the measure $W(x)dx$. This, together with $L^2_W$ boundedness of Riesz
transforms \cite{EHH}, implies that the Riesz transforms are bounded in $L^p_W$
for $1<p<2$. Our results are applicable to the case of real coefficients having
sufficiently small BMO norm.

AI.tldr: 证明了非散度型椭圆算子的Riesz变换在加权测度下的弱(1,1)型估计
AI.motivation: 研究非散度型椭圆算子L的Riesz变换在加权测度W(x)dx下的有界性，其中W是伴随解且满足A_2条件，适用于具有小BMO范数的实系数情形
AI.techniques: 利用伴随解W作为权函数，结合A_2权理论，建立Riesz变换的弱(1,1)型估计，结合已有的L^2_W有界性得到L^p_W有界性
AI.main_theorems: 当W∈A_2时，Riesz变换∇L^{-1/2}相对于测度W(x)dx是弱(1,1)型的；结合L^2_W有界性，得到Riesz变换在L^p_W(1<p<2)上有界
AI.significance: 扩展了非散度型椭圆算子Riesz变换的加权理论，为具有小BMO系数的椭圆算子提供了新的函数空间估计，在调和分析和椭圆PDE理论中有重要应用

title: Convergence of random splitting method for the Allen-Cahn equation in a   background flow
summary:
We study in this paper the convergence of the random splitting method for
Allen-Cahn equation in a background flow that plays as a simplified model for
phase separation in multiphase flows. The model does not own the gradient flow
structure as the usual Allen-Cahn equation does, and the random splitting
method is advantageous due to its simplicity and better convergence rate.
Though the random splitting is a classical method, the analysis of the
convergence is not straightforward for this model due to the nonlinearity and
unboundedness of the operators. We obtain uniform estimates of various Sobolev
norms of the numerical solutions and the stability of the model. Based on the
Sobolev estimates, the local trunction errors are then rigorously obtained. We
then prove that the random operator splitting has an expected single run error
with order $1.5$ and a bias with order $2$. Numerical experiments are then
performed to confirm our theoretic findings.

AI.tldr: 证明了随机分裂方法求解背景流中Allen-Cahn方程的收敛性，获得期望单次运行误差1.5阶和偏差2阶
AI.motivation: 研究背景流中Allen-Cahn方程的随机分裂方法收敛性，该模型是多相流中相分离的简化模型，缺乏通常Allen-Cahn方程的梯度流结构，随机分裂方法因其简单性和更好收敛率而具有优势
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev范数的一致估计、局部截断误差的严格推导、随机算子分裂分析，以及数值解的稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了随机算子分裂方法具有期望单次运行误差1.5阶和偏差2阶的收敛性，获得了数值解各种Sobolev范数的一致估计和模型的稳定性
AI.significance: 为缺乏梯度流结构的Allen-Cahn方程提供了随机分裂方法的严格收敛性分析，扩展了随机分裂方法在复杂非线性偏微分方程中的应用，为多相流相分离的数值模拟提供了理论基础

title: Periodic propagation of singularities for heat equations with time delay
summary:
This paper presents two remarkable phenomena associated with the heat
equation with a time delay: namely, the propagation of singularities and
periodicity. These are manifested through a distinctive mode of propagation of
singularities in the solutions. Precisely, the singularities of the solutions
propagate periodically in a bidirectional fashion along the time axis.
Furthermore, this propagation occurs in a stepwise manner. More specifically,
when propagating in the positive time direction, the order of the joint
derivatives of the solution increases by 2 for each period; conversely, when
propagating in the reverse time direction, the order of the joint derivatives
decreases by 2 per period. Additionally, we elucidate the way in which the
initial data and historical values impact such a propagation of singularities.
  The phenomena we have discerned not only corroborate the pronounced
differences between heat equations with and without time delay but also vividly
illustrate the substantial divergence between the heat equation with a time
delay and the wave equation, especially when viewed from the point of view of
singularity propagation.

AI.tldr: 揭示了时滞热方程解中奇异性传播的两个显著现象：周期性双向传播和阶梯式传播模式
AI.motivation: 研究时滞热方程与无时滞热方程以及波动方程在奇异性传播方面的本质差异，探索时滞对热方程解行为的影响
AI.techniques: 时滞偏微分方程分析、奇异性传播理论、周期性现象研究、导数阶数变化分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 时滞热方程解中奇异性沿时间轴周期性双向传播；2. 奇异性传播呈阶梯式：正向传播时联合导数阶数每周期增加2，反向传播时每周期减少2；3. 初始数据和历史值对奇异性传播方式的影响
AI.significance: 首次揭示了时滞热方程特有的奇异性传播机制，为理解时滞偏微分方程与经典方程的本质差异提供了新视角，对控制理论和延迟系统分析有重要理论意义

title: Global-in-time estimates for the 2D one-phase Muskat problem with   contact points
summary:
In this paper, we study the dynamics of a two-dimensional viscous fluid
evolving through a porous medium or a Hele-Shaw cell, driven by gravity and
surface tension. A key feature of this study is that the fluid is confined
within a vessel with vertical walls and below a dry region. Consequently, the
dynamics of the contact points between the vessel, the fluid and the dry region
are inherently coupled with the surface evolution. A similar contact scenario
was recently analyzed for more regular viscous flows, modeled by the Stokes
[GuoTice2018] and Navier-Stokes [GuoTice2024] equations. Here, we adopt the
same framework but use the more singular Darcy's law for modeling the flow. We
prove global-in-time a priori estimates for solutions initially close to
equilibrium. Taking advantage of the Neumann problem solved by the velocity
potential, the analysis is carried out in non-weighted $L^2$-based Sobolev
spaces and without imposing restrictions on the contact angles.

AI.tldr: 在具有垂直壁面的容器中，研究Darcy定律描述的多孔介质或Hele-Shaw细胞中粘性流体的接触点动力学，证明了接近平衡解的全局先验估计。
AI.motivation: 研究多孔介质或Hele-Shaw细胞中粘性流体在重力、表面张力作用下的动力学，特别关注流体与容器壁面、干燥区域接触点的耦合演化问题。先前研究已分析了Stokes和Navier-Stokes方程描述的更规则粘性流动，本文采用更奇异的Darcy定律模型。
AI.techniques: 利用速度势的Neumann问题，在非加权L²-based Sobolev空间中进行分析，不施加接触角限制，建立全局先验估计。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了初始接近平衡解的全局时间先验估计，在非加权L²-based Sobolev空间中分析，无需接触角限制条件。
AI.significance: 将接触点动力学分析扩展到更奇异的Darcy流动模型，为多孔介质和Hele-Shaw细胞中的流体界面问题提供了新的理论框架，具有实际应用价值。
